suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Repair the `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` droid model configuration and document a manual-review fallback when reviewer Task launches fail.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The round-2 re-review again could not spawn `scrutiny-feature-reviewer`: the Task tool exited with `Invalid model: custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3`, the same failure already captured in round 1, so the review had to be completed manually.
